race.comment: SAIGON DANCER (1) bolted in fresh at Northam when running away to score by 2.7L, but couldn't repeat the dose as favourite here on the main course. Back in trip today is some query, though the wet track should suit as should the wider gate. Can swoop and claim the prize. WHERE'S BRITTANY (13) resumed on a good note over this trip at Belmont when closing nicely late in the race. The form out of that race has been strong since and CJP sticks with her. Can lob in a handier position and with improvement on the cards, she can go a couple better. ROCK THE MARKET (5) gets Pike on board fresh and can feature in the finish. LADY KIKI (3) can improve on the fresh performance coming back in distance.
